Class TacletAppContainer

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.RuleAppContainer
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.TacletAppContainer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<RuleAppContainer>
Direct Known Subclasses:
FindTacletAppContainer, NoFindTacletAppContainer
public abstract class TacletAppContainer extends RuleAppContainer
Instances of this class are immutable

      public final ImmutableList<RuleAppContainer> createFurtherApps(Goal p_goal)
      Create a list of new RuleAppContainers that are to be considered for application.
      Specified by:
      createFurtherApps in class RuleAppContainer

    • createInitialAppContainers

      protected static ImmutableList<RuleAppContainer> createInitialAppContainers(ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> p_app, PosInOccurrence p_pio, Goal p_goal)

    • assumesFormulasStillValid

      protected boolean assumesFormulasStillValid(Goal p_goal)
      Returns:
      true iff instantiation of the assumes-formulas of the stored taclet app exist and are valid are still valid, i.e. the referenced formulas still exist

    • isStillApplicable

      protected abstract boolean isStillApplicable(Goal p_goal)
      Returns:
      true iff the stored rule app is applicable for the given sequent, i.e. if the find-position does still exist (assumes-formulas are not considered)

    • getPosInOccurrence

      protected PosInOccurrence getPosInOccurrence(Goal p_goal)

    • completeRuleApp

      public TacletApp completeRuleApp(Goal p_goal)
      Create a RuleApp that is suitable to be applied or null.
